caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or interview titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hand while speaking into the microphone. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional discussion, possibly related to business, fashion, or personal experiences.
